tests.name: ncmoe60_split_mulmatid_verbose_p0n1
tests.important_result: model loaded, context constructed, KV assigned across all 4 B70s, graph reserved with 3975 nodes and 122 splits
tests.failure: after more than 8 minutes the JSONL was still empty and strace showed the main llama-bench thread spinning in sched_yield, indicating an event/queue wait that did not complete

interpretation: The split MUL_MAT_ID capability removes the earlier monolithic expert placement blocker. Runtime is not viable yet; the naive token-generation helper likely stalls in a SYCL event/queue wait during first decode.
